Reviews About Contact

About PetFoodLab

We're on a mission to help pet owners make informed decisions about pet food.

Our Story

PetFoodLab was founded in 2026 by pet owners who were frustrated by the lack of honest, science-backed pet food reviews. Too many sites are influenced by manufacturer partnerships or affiliate commissions.

We take a different approach: every review is based on ingredient analysis, nutritional science, and real customer feedback.

Our Review Process

  1. Ingredient Analysis: We evaluate every ingredient for quality and safety
  2. Nutritional Completeness: We verify AAFCO compliance
  3. Customer Feedback: We analyze thousands of verified reviews
  4. Value Assessment: We calculate price per serving for fair comparisons

Our Promise

  • ✅ Independent reviews - we buy products ourselves
  • ✅ No manufacturer influence
  • ✅ Transparent affiliate disclosure
  • ✅ Science-backed recommendations

Contact Us

Have questions or suggestions? Reach out at hello@petfoodlab.it.com

© 2026 PetFoodLab. All rights reserved.

We independently review pet food products. When you buy through our links, we may earn a commission.
